case_title: EL BETHEL TERRACE, INC. VS. REGNALDO WOODS DBA UP FROM DARKNESS et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EL BETHEL TERRACE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REGNALDO WOODS DBA UP FROM DARKNESS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1075 FILLMORE STREET, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94115, LEASE FORFEITED, **JUDGMENT ALSO APPLIES TO ALL UNKNOWN/UNNAMED OCCUPANTS.**
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF EL BETHEL TERRACE, INC.
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF EL BETHEL TERRACE, INC.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EL BETHEL TERRACE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT REGNALDO WOODS DBA UP FROM DARKNESS DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EL BETHEL TERRACE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT REGNALDO WOODS DBA UP FROM DARKNESS DOES 1 TO 10

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF EL BETHEL TERRACE, INC. SERVED FEB-21-2013, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT REGNALDO WOODS DBA UP FROM DARKNESS

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF EL BETHEL TERRACE, INC. SERVED FEB-21-2013, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
